name: studiomeyer-memory-hooks
description: Auto-persist sessions, snapshot before context compact, recall on user prompt, ingest subagent reports. Four mcp_tool hooks for the StudioMeyer Memory MCP. Requires Claude Code v2.1.118 or later.

compliance.gdpr: Data flows from your Claude Code session to your own Memory tenant on memory.studiomeyer.io. No third-party sharing. Tenant-isolated. Delete anytime via the Memory dashboard.
compliance.notes: SubagentStop fires nex_session_end for the parent session_id (idempotent NOOP if already ended). The Academy recipe 16.2 example uses ${last_assistant_message} to feed nex_learn, but as of Claude Code v2.1.118 that variable is NOT in the canonical substitution list (cwd, tool_input, tool_name, session_id, duration_ms, user_prompt). To capture subagent findings as a learning, call nex_learn explicitly from the parent assistant after the subagent returns.
